/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, or entity responds, and no latent/disabled-view claim. Free to use.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed. The moderated_content view exists but lives at /admin/content/moderated, not this hyphenated top-level path, so no collision.

/blog.reason: Already taken: it is the canonical URL alias of canvas_page entity 2 ("Blog", internal /page/2). A new node here would collide now.

/search.reason: Owned by the enabled Views page display search:page (route view.search.page). A node alias here would shadow and hijack the search view.

/admin/content/files.reason: Latent claim: the disabled Files view (views.view.files:page_1) declares this path. file/media modules are enabled, so enabling that view (routine config) would collide.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Latent claim: the disabled scheduler_scheduled_media view (overview display) declares this path. scheduler module is enabled, so enabling that view (routine config) would collide.
